title: centaurea markiana
intro: Centaurea markiana, also known as the Cornflower or Mountain Cornflower, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea markiana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
